'''M'shento'su'Nikto''', or '''Southern Nikto''', were a [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] [[Subspecies/Legends|subspecies]] with no horns, a covered nose, and several pairs of breathing tubes. These tubes were larger than those of the [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]], and also acted as primitive ultrasonic sensory organs. Their skin color varied from [[Color/Legends|white to yellow or orange]].

{{Species-stub}}
